title: Static Burn
text: A neural scar from signal lash and broken ward feedback.
flavor: Old route prayers come back as noise when you try to sleep.
trigger: The first anomaly or signal check you face each session.
penalty: Gain 1 Heat as the scar starts broadcasting through you.
relief: Spend a charged artifact charge before the check to ignore this scar for that encounter.
upside: If the check succeeds anyway, gain 1 trophy from the clean reading.
